subcodes.first_line: This is the Book We have sent down in truth; verily, at all times it calleth unto all who dwell in the realm of contingent being, and summoneth them unto the path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزلناه بالحق انه فی کل الاحیان ینادی من فی الامکان و یدعوهم الی صراط
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
